headline: Roche Reports Positive Results From Head-to-Head Study on NSCLC Drug
summary: RHHBY announces positive phase III Krascendo 1 results for divarasib in KRAS G12C NSCLC, showing PFS and OS gains versus approved inhibitors.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

raw.headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 Facing Headwinds
